description_long: This is a medium-sized, round bowl with a wide base and gently sloping sides that curve upward to a slightly raised rim. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of a light-colored ceramic or porcelain, giving it a clean and modern look. There are a few small, irregular dark marks or chips visible on the exterior, suggesting some wear or minor damage. The bowl's interior is not visible, but the overall form suggests it is hollow and capable of holding food or liquid. The rim is subtly defined, and the base is broad, providing stability when placed on flat surfaces. The design is utilitarian, with no visible handles or decorative patterns.
description: A smooth, light-colored ceramic bowl with a wide base, gently sloping sides, and minor exterior marks. The design is simple and functional.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from a side angle, showing a smooth, unadorned surface with a small dark mark on the left side.
description_view_1: This view reveals a larger dark chip or mark on the right side of the bowl, indicating some wear.
description_view_2: Two prominent dark marks are visible on the left and right sides, highlighting the bowl's imperfections.
description_view_3: A single dark mark is visible on the left side, with the rest of the surface appearing clean and smooth.
